gates.name: Pedestrian/Drone Data Gate
gates.next_fix: Provide local SDD/OpenTraj if this is empty.

gates.name: Long-Horizon Gate
gates.next_fix: If false, do not claim pedestrian long-horizon world model.

gates.name: Scene-Gold Gate
gates.next_fix: Upgrade rule-confirmed silver to human-confirmed gold where possible.

gates.name: Per-Agent Episode Gate
gates.next_fix: Do not train multi-agent world model. Episodes are not truly multi-agent.

gates.name: GoalBench-Gold Gate
gates.next_fix: If below 50, GoalBench remains diagnostic only.

gates.name: No Leakage Gate
gates.evidence: candidate goals train-only; future endpoint labels eval/train only; central velocity not used

gates.name: Stage 9 Readiness Gate
gates.next_fix: Pass data, scene, per-agent, no-leakage gates first.
